_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Screeps
author: pterodactyl.relieving197@passmail.net

variables.name: Mods List
variables.description:
Comma separated list of mods to include. E.g. `screepsmod-auth, screepsmod-admin-utils, ...`.
https://github.com/ScreepsMods

Special setup is required if using the `screepsmod-mongo` mod.
https://github.com/jkturcotte/screeps-egg

variables.name: Bots List
variables.description:
A comma separated list/dictionary format of bots to include.
E.g. `simplebot: screepsbot-zeswarm, ...`
`simplebot` is the name of the AI in the server and `screepsbot-zeswarm` is the A.I that the screeps-launcher recognizes.

Anything bot supported by the screeps-launcher should work but I couldn't find a list.
https://github.com/screepers/screeps-launcher

variables.name: Welcome Text
variables.description: The welcome text for the server. Requires `screepsmod-admin-utils`. Also seems broken right now. Seems the variable doesn't support some characters you may want to use in an HTML formatted welcome text.

variables.name: Tick Rate
variables.description: Tick rate in milliseconds. Requires the `screepsmod-admin-utils` mod.

variables.name: Mongo Host
variables.description: Mongo host IP when using the `screepsmod-mongo` mod.

variables.name: MONGO_PORT
variables.description: Mongo port when using the `screepsmod-mongo` mod.

variables.name: Redis Host
variables.description: Redis host IP when using the `screepsmod-mongo` mod.

variables.name: Redis Port
variables.description: Redis port when using the `screepsmod-mongo` mod.
